feed.title: NVO987 Identity and Research Feed
feed.subtitle: Identity and research updates related to decentralized identity, semantic web technologies, and modern and contemporary visual culture.

entry.title: Decentralized Identity (did:web)
entry.summary: Primary decentralized identifier associated with Nicholas Van-Orton.

entry.title: Decentralized Identity (Ethereum DID)
entry.summary: Ethereum-based decentralized identity associated with the NVO987 identity infrastructure.

entry.title: Decentralized Identity (AT Protocol)
entry.summary: AT Protocol decentralized identifier used by the Bluesky network.

entry.title: Civilizational Interpretive Ratio
entry.summary: Research project examining the relationship between autonomous systems and human interpretive capacity.

entry.title: Color as a Generative Principle in the Work of Sonia Delaunay
entry.summary: Scholarly article exploring the generative role of color in the work of Sonia Delaunay.

entry.title: NVO987 – Culture Visuelle Moderne et Contemporaine
entry.summary: Cultural and research association founded by Nicholas Van-Orton based in Paris, France.
